project.name: MoveSook
project.description: On-demand two-sided moving marketplace for Thailand: customers post moving jobs and nearby available drivers claim them in real time (no pre-declared trips). Covers job posting with a manual bank-transfer payment gate, driver onboarding/verification, on-demand matching, a job lifecycle state machine, a commission ledger with driver payouts, reviews/ratings, growth levers (promos, referrals, surge), and a broad admin/back-office surface including PDPA compliance.

nodes.name: Identity & Access
nodes.summary: Authenticates the platform's two separate audiences and enforces role-based access. Customers/drivers sign in with LINE id_tokens (LIFF) while admins use email+password with rate-limiting; both get a self-signed JWT but in differently-named httpOnly cookies so sessions never collide across subdomains.

businessRules: USER/DRIVER and ADMIN use separately-named cookies (USER_COOKIE_NAME vs ADMIN_COOKIE_NAME)
RBAC has no implicit hierarchy — ADMIN is not automatically a DRIVER; each route lists exact roles
Admin login is bcrypt-verified with constant-time compare and in-memory rate-limit/lockout
Banned users are rejected at login
crossDomainInteractions: Issues the role that the Driver Marketplace and Admin Back-Office gate on
Refreshes the session cookie when a user is promoted to DRIVER

nodes.name: Job Marketplace & Lifecycle
nodes.summary: The core customer-facing domain: posting a moving job, gating it behind a manual bank-transfer payment approval, and advancing it through the shared job state machine from POSTED to DELIVERED. Includes pricing/estimates, on-demand driver matching by province, live SSE tracking, proof photos, cancellation, reviews and disputes.

businessRules: New customer jobs post as PENDING_PAYMENT and stay hidden from drivers until admin approves the transfer slip
canTransition() enforces legal job-status jumps; drivers may only advance up to PENDING_CONFIRMATION (admin confirms DELIVERED)
Acceptance is an atomic conditional updateMany on status=POSTED, driverId=null — first approved driver wins the claim race
Server recomputes price from distance + floor/helper surcharges; client-supplied price is ignored
One review per delivered job, authored by the job's customer
crossDomainInteractions: Acceptance snapshots commissionPct used later by the Financial Ledger
Confirming DELIVERED triggers the commission Transaction + payout in the Financial Ledger
Driver feed depends on the driver's serviceProvince and APPROVED status from Driver Marketplace
Applies promo/surge/referral levers from Growth & Engagement

nodes.name: Driver Onboarding & Supply
nodes.summary: Manages the driver side of the marketplace: claiming an admin-issued invite code to become a driver, completing the application, admin verification, and controlling live supply via availability toggles and GPS broadcasts. Also surfaces the driver's earnings and gamified weekly incentives.

businessRules: Drivers are pre-registered by admins (claim code / connect); there is no public self-signup
Claiming a driver code promotes the user's role to DRIVER but does not approve them
Job acceptance is gated on verifyStatus === 'APPROVED'
A driver cannot go off-duty while holding an in-hand job (ACCEPTED/PICKED_UP/IN_TRANSIT)
Each application submission re-anchors the verify-queue SLA clock
crossDomainInteractions: Verification is performed by Admin Back-Office
serviceProvince + availability drive the Job Marketplace on-demand feed
Earnings and incentives read from the Financial Ledger transactions

nodes.name: Financial Ledger & Payouts
nodes.summary: The money domain: the commission ledger and driver payouts. A Transaction row is created idempotently inside the same DB transaction that flips a job to DELIVERED, snapshotting gross amount and the job's accept-time commission %, then accumulated into the driver's open payout round for the admin to mark paid.

businessRules: commissionPct defaults from AppSetting (12%) and is snapshotted onto the Job at accept time so later changes don't rewrite history
One Transaction per job (unique jobId) — delivery confirmation is idempotent
Split math lives once in computeCommission() in @movesook/shared
Delivery confirmation is blocked unless the job has both a driver and a positive price
New transactions auto-attach to the driver's open PENDING payout round
crossDomainInteractions: Driven by the DELIVERED transition in the Job Marketplace
Feeds driver earnings/incentives in Driver Marketplace
Payout marking and transaction edits are Admin Back-Office actions

nodes.name: Growth & Engagement
nodes.summary: Demand/retention levers layered onto the marketplace: promo codes that discount a job subtotal, two-sided referral rewards paid on a referee's first confirmed delivery, surge pricing by province, in-app notifications, and driver weekly-goal incentives.

businessRules: Promo is preview-only on estimate; usedCount is incremented only when the job is created
A referral code can be applied once and never to oneself; reward fires on the referee's first DELIVERED job
notify() only writes in-app Notification rows and must never break the triggering action (best-effort)
crossDomainInteractions: Promo + surge adjust pricing in the Job Marketplace estimate/create
Referral reward fires off the DELIVERED transition
Notifications fan out across job, driver-verify and cancellation events

nodes.name: Admin Back-Office & Compliance
nodes.summary: The operations control plane: stats/analytics, driver verification queue, payment-slip approval, job/transaction/payout management, disputes, blacklist, settings (commission/pricing/system/service-areas/vehicle-pricing/promos), admin invites, audit logging, and PDPA consents/export/anonymization. Every privileged action is RBAC-scoped and audit-logged.

businessRules: Admin sub-roles (SUPER/OPS/FINANCE) scope each action; finance-only routes for money/settings
Approving a payment slip flips a job PENDING_PAYMENT -> POSTED and fans out the new-job alert; rejecting bounces it back
New admins come only from seed/CLI or invite by an existing admin — never a public endpoint
Driver verification, delivery confirmation, and payout marking are admin-only
Privileged actions are written to AuditLog
crossDomainInteractions: Gates publication of jobs in the Job Marketplace via payment approval
Confirms DELIVERED which triggers the Financial Ledger
Verifies drivers in the Driver Marketplace
Configures commission/pricing/promos consumed across pricing and finance

nodes.name: Customer/Driver LINE Login
nodes.summary: A LIFF client exchanges a LINE id_token for a MoveSook session cookie, upserting the user and issuing a role-stamped JWT.

nodes.name: Admin Email/Password Login
nodes.summary: An admin authenticates with email+password against bcrypt with rate-limiting and receives a separate admin cookie.

nodes.name: Post a Moving Job
nodes.summary: A customer estimates a quote then posts a job, which is created as PENDING_PAYMENT and held hidden from drivers until payment is approved.

nodes.name: Payment Slip Approval Gate
nodes.summary: The customer uploads a bank-transfer slip and an admin approves it, flipping the job to POSTED and alerting drivers in the area (rejection bounces it back).

nodes.name: Accept & Deliver Job
nodes.summary: An approved driver browses the on-demand feed, wins an open job via an atomic claim, then advances it through the state machine up to PENDING_CONFIRMATION for admin sign-off.

nodes.name: Cancel Job
nodes.summary: A customer cancels their own job before pickup; a cancellation fee may apply past the free-cancel window and any assigned driver is notified.

nodes.name: Review Delivered Job
nodes.summary: After delivery the customer rates the driver once; the driver's denormalised ratingAvg/ratingCount are recomputed in the same transaction.

nodes.name: Driver Onboarding & Application
nodes.summary: A user claims an admin-issued invite code to become a DRIVER, then fills in vehicle/bank/service-province details, submitting the application for review.

nodes.name: Admin Driver Verification
nodes.summary: An admin reviews the verify queue and approves/rejects/suspends a driver application, writing an audit log and notifying the applicant.

nodes.name: Driver Availability & Location
nodes.summary: A driver toggles online/offline for the on-demand feed and broadcasts GPS for live tracking, both counting as activity that resets the idle clock.

nodes.name: Commission Ledger on Delivery
nodes.summary: When an admin confirms a job DELIVERED, the commission Transaction is written idempotently and attached to the driver's open payout round in one DB transaction.

nodes.name: Driver Payouts
nodes.summary: An admin marks a driver's accumulated payout round as paid (with slip + reference) after delivery transactions have rolled into it.

nodes.name: Promo Code Pricing
nodes.summary: A promo code is previewed against a quote at estimate time and consumed (usedCount incremented) only when the discounted job is actually created.

nodes.name: Referral Program
nodes.summary: A customer applies a friend's referral code once; the two-sided reward is granted on that customer's first confirmed delivery.

nodes.name: PDPA Consent & Anonymization
nodes.summary: Admins record/read user consents and anonymize a user's personal data on request, satisfying Thai PDPA obligations.

nodes.name: Platform Settings Management
nodes.summary: Finance/super admins configure commission, per-vehicle pricing, service areas, and system settings that the pricing and matching engines read.

nodes.name: Verify LINE id_token
nodes.summary: Validate the LINE id_token against LINE with aud/iss/exp checks.

nodes.name: Upsert user from profile
nodes.summary: Create or update the User by lineUserId and reject banned accounts.

nodes.name: Issue session cookie
nodes.summary: Sign a role-stamped JWT and set the USER httpOnly cookie.

nodes.name: Check rate-limit / lockout
nodes.summary: Gate the attempt by IP+email and 429 if too many failures.

nodes.name: Verify password (bcrypt)
nodes.summary: Constant-time bcrypt compare against the admin credential, asserting ADMIN role.

nodes.name: Issue admin cookie
nodes.summary: Record success and set the separately-named ADMIN session cookie.

nodes.name: System & service-area guards
nodes.summary: Reject if maintenance mode, inactive vehicle type, out-of-area province, or schedule window exceeded.

nodes.name: Compute server-side price
nodes.summary: Derive distance + floor/helper/surge surcharges via computeJobQuote and clamp into the price window; client price is ignored.

nodes.name: Find-or-create customer
nodes.summary: Upsert the signed-in user's own Customer record.

nodes.name: Create job as PENDING_PAYMENT
nodes.summary: Persist the job hidden from drivers and consume any applied promo in the same transaction.

nodes.name: Upload transfer slip
nodes.summary: Customer attaches the bank-transfer slip URL; job stays PENDING_PAYMENT and any prior rejection is cleared.

nodes.name: Admin approves payment
nodes.summary: Finance/ops admin approves the slip, flipping the job PENDING_PAYMENT -> POSTED.

nodes.name: Fan out new-job alert
nodes.summary: Notify drivers in the origin province that a new job is available (notifyNewJobToArea).

nodes.name: Reject & bounce back
nodes.summary: Rejecting clears the slip and returns the job to PENDING_PAYMENT for re-upload.

nodes.name: List on-demand feed
nodes.summary: Return open POSTED unassigned jobs whose originProvince matches the driver's serviceProvince.

nodes.name: Gate on APPROVED + capacity
nodes.summary: Reject acceptance unless the driver is APPROVED and under their max active-job cap.

nodes.name: Atomic claim race
nodes.summary: Conditional updateMany on POSTED+driverId:null wins the claim and snapshots commissionPct.

nodes.name: Advance through state machine
nodes.summary: Driver moves the job PICKED_UP -> IN_TRANSIT -> PENDING_CONFIRMATION via canTransition, capped before DELIVERED.

nodes.name: Attach proof photos
nodes.summary: Driver uploads pickup/delivery proof photo URLs to the job.

nodes.name: Admin confirms DELIVERED
nodes.summary: Admin validates driver+price and flips the job to DELIVERED, the only path to terminal success.

nodes.name: Guard cancellable state
nodes.summary: Allow cancel only while DRAFT/PENDING_PAYMENT/POSTED/ACCEPTED (not after transport begins).

nodes.name: Apply cancellation fee
nodes.summary: Charge a fee and notify the customer if cancelled past the free-cancel window.

nodes.name: Notify assigned driver
nodes.summary: Inform any already-assigned driver that the job was cancelled.

nodes.name: Guard delivered & owner
nodes.summary: Allow review only for the job's customer on a DELIVERED job with no prior review.

nodes.name: Create review
nodes.summary: Persist the rating + comment authored by the customer.

nodes.name: Recompute driver rating
nodes.summary: Aggregate Review and update the driver's denormalised ratingAvg/ratingCount in the same transaction.

nodes.name: Claim invite code
nodes.summary: Link a pending admin-created Driver to the user via its claim code.

nodes.name: Promote to DRIVER
nodes.summary: Set the user's role to DRIVER and reissue the session cookie so it takes effect immediately.

nodes.name: Submit application
nodes.summary: Driver fills vehicle/bank/service-province; submission anchors the verify SLA and re-queues a rejected app.

nodes.name: Read verify queue
nodes.summary: Admin lists drivers awaiting verification.

nodes.name: Approve / reject / suspend
nodes.summary: Set verifyStatus, drop a rejected/suspended driver from the feed, and store any reason.

nodes.name: Audit & notify driver
nodes.summary: Write an AuditLog entry and notify the driver of the verification outcome.

nodes.name: Guard in-hand jobs
nodes.summary: Block going off-duty while the driver still holds an ACCEPTED/PICKED_UP/IN_TRANSIT job.

nodes.name: Toggle availability
nodes.summary: Flip isAvailable and reset the idle-churn clock.

nodes.name: Broadcast GPS
nodes.summary: Persist the driver's latest lat/lng for live SSE tracking.

nodes.name: Guard driver & price
nodes.summary: Block delivery confirmation unless the job has both an assigned driver and a positive price.

nodes.name: Create commission transaction
nodes.summary: Idempotently write the Transaction snapshotting gross + commissionPct via computeCommission.

nodes.name: Attach to payout round
nodes.summary: Accumulate the net-to-driver amount into the driver's open PENDING payout, creating one if needed.

nodes.name: List payouts
nodes.summary: Admin lists driver payout rounds and their transactions.

nodes.name: Mark transaction paid
nodes.summary: Finance admin marks the payout/transaction as PAID with slip + reference.

nodes.name: Evaluate promo on estimate
nodes.summary: Preview a promo discount against the quote subtotal without consuming it.

nodes.name: Consume promo at create
nodes.summary: Increment the promo's usedCount in the job-create transaction.

nodes.name: Apply referral code
nodes.summary: Link the customer to the referrer once, rejecting self-referral and re-use.

nodes.name: Issue reward on first delivery
nodes.summary: Grant the two-sided reward when the referred customer's first job is confirmed DELIVERED.

nodes.name: Record / read consent
nodes.summary: Admin records and reads a user's PDPA consents.

nodes.name: Anonymize user
nodes.summary: Super admin anonymizes a user's personal data per PDPA request.

nodes.name: Set commission %
nodes.summary: Update the commission_pct AppSetting used at job accept time.

nodes.name: Set pricing & vehicle rates
nodes.summary: Configure base pricing and per-vehicle-type rates read by the quote engine.

nodes.name: Set service areas
nodes.summary: Configure the provinces the platform serves, constraining posting and matching.

edges.description: Issues USER/DRIVER sessions that gate all customer/driver job actions.
Issues admin sessions and enforces RBAC sub-roles for back-office actions.
Driver serviceProvince + availability + APPROVED status drive the on-demand job feed and acceptance gate.
Accept snapshots commissionPct; the DELIVERED transition triggers the commission Transaction and payout.
Ledger transactions feed driver earnings and weekly incentives.
Promo and surge adjust the job quote; notifications fan out across job events.
Admin payment approval publishes jobs and admin confirmation finalizes DELIVERED.
Admins pre-register and verify drivers, controlling who can accept jobs.
